untranslatable_reason: Twin peaks of similar height/width detection requires multi-bar pattern recognition (comparing peak1_high ≈ peak2_high and peak1_width ≈ peak2_width). Available indicators lack explicit peak-matching or pattern-memory capabilities. The 'Confirmation Line between peaks' also lacks direct translation. Converted using shooting star (upper_wick > body), overbought price position (price_pos_20 > 0.8), and Donchian breakdowns as proxies for double-top reversal behavior.
